name: a-share-after-hours-brief-skill
description: Codex skill for A-share after-hours stock review with portable JSON history.

scripts.check: node bin/install.js --dry-run && PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/tmp/a-share-after-hours-brief-skill-pycache python3 -m py_compile scripts/review_journal.py scripts/correlation.py scripts/kline_features.py && PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/tmp/a-share-after-hours-brief-skill-pycache python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -p 'test_*.py' && node --test tests/test_installer.mjs
